hero.bio_pre: Full Stack Developer specialized in building scalable end-to-end products. Experienced in the
hero.bio_post: ecosystem, with solid knowledge of cloud infrastructure and deployment.

marcovich.description: Full platform for a premium barbershop: 5-step online booking system, client authentication, admin panel, and email + WhatsApp notifications.

coming_soon.name: Next project
coming_soon.description: Continuously building new products. If you have a project in mind, let's talk.

bullets: Business logic development in C# and .NET 8, ensuring corporate scalability and performance.
Optimization of relational databases (SQL Server / MySQL) with efficient schemas and complex queries.
Application of SOLID principles and design patterns in code refactoring.
Collaboration in agile methodologies with shadowing and code review alongside senior developers.
Marcovich Barbería (Production): Full platform with Next.js/Supabase, automated booking via WhatsApp API & n8n, VPS deployment (Docker/Coolify) with Cloudflare and Google Calendar.
Automation & QA: n8n workflows for B2B prospecting, testing with Playwright and Lighthouse (Performance/SEO).
Active projects: E-commerce with payment gateway, Health-Tech nutrition system, and optimized Marketing Sites.
